options.content:
# Loki / LogQL 备忘（AFBuyers）

在 **Grafana → Explore → Loki** 中试用下列片段；时间范围建议 **Last 15m** 或 **Last 1h**。

---

## 标签与流

```logql
{job="masque-server"}
```

```logql
{job="masque-server", level="error"}
```

---

## 行过滤（管道）

```logql
{job="masque-server"} |= "connect"
```

```logql
{job="masque-server"} != "healthz"
```


```logql
{job="masque-server"} |~ "error|panic"
```

---

## JSON / key=value 日志

```logql
{job="app"} | json | status_code >= 500
```

```logql
{job="app"} | logfmt | level="error"
```

---

## 速率与聚合（指标化）

```logql
sum(count_over_time({job="masque-server"}[1m]))
```

```logql
sum by (level) (count_over_time({job="masque-server"}[5m]))
```

---

## CONNECT-IP 路由推送排障（invalid_cidr / acl_denied / write_error）

```logql
{job="masque-server"} |= "connect-ip stub: CONNECT_IP_ROUTE_ADV_CIDR invalid"
```

```logql
{job="masque-server"} |= "connect-ip stub: skip route push" |= "outside device ACL"
```

```logql
{job="masque-server"} |= "connect-ip stub: route push write"
```

```logql
sum(count_over_time({job="masque-server"} |= "connect-ip stub: CONNECT_IP_ROUTE_ADV_CIDR invalid" [5m]))
```

```logql
sum(count_over_time({job="masque-server"} |= "connect-ip stub: skip route push" |= "outside device ACL" [5m]))
```

```logql
sum(count_over_time({job="masque-server"} |= "connect-ip stub: route push write" [5m]))
```

---

## 排查提示

- Loki **未就绪** 时 `/ready` 可能返回 **503**，Compose 刚启动属正常。
- 更完整的说明见仓库：`docs/runbooks/loki-logql-cheatsheet.md`。
